name: Check of a book format in LYRASIS
fullName: Book detail view screen: Check of a book format in LYRASIS
statusMessage: Book format is not correct expected:<Audioboo[K]> but was:<Audioboo[k]>
statusTrace:
org.junit.ComparisonFailure: Book format is not correct expected:<Audioboo[K]> but was:<Audioboo[k]>
	at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.isBookFormatCorrect(BookDetailsSteps.java:187)
	at ✽.Book format in Information section is 'AudiobooK' on book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/BookDetailView.feature:62)

testStage.statusMessage: Book format is not correct expected:<Audioboo[K]> but was:<Audioboo[k]>
testStage.statusTrace:
org.junit.ComparisonFailure: Book format is not correct expected:<Audioboo[K]> but was:<Audioboo[k]>
	at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.isBookFormatCorrect(BookDetailsSteps.java:187)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Palace Marketplace' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Book format in Information section is displayed on book details screen
And  Book format in Information section is 'AudiobooK' on book details screen
